nasb.text: For from within, out of the heart of men, proceed the evil thoughts, fornications, thefts, murders, adulteries,

esv.text: For from within, out of the heart of man, come evil thoughts, sexual immorality, theft, murder, adultery,

cnv.text: 因為從裡面，就是從人的心裡，發出惡念、淫亂、偷盜、兇殺、

ccb.text: 因为从里面，就是从人的心里能够生出恶念、苟合、偷盗、谋杀、

csbs.text: 因为从里面，就是从人心里发出种种恶念：淫乱、偷窃、杀人、
